This directly aligns with the 'Premium Medical Network' entry under 'travel_enhancement_services' in the ground-truth data (same wording and emphasis on global coverage and emergency support). The ground-truth property protection section includes 'LifeFirst Standard Coverage' (not Plan) with rating 9. The AI slightly mixed naming ('Plan' vs. 'Coverage'), but the description matches the LifeFirst property protection. Therefore, map to 'LifeFirst Standard Coverage' with rating 9. 
4. The 'travel_coverage' mentions 'Adventure travel addon with specialized rescue services, remote location coverage, adventure sports coverage for glacier photography and yoga retreats - €50/month'. This directly matches 'Adventure Travel Coverage' under 'travel_enhancement_services', rated 10. 
5. The 'additional_services' include 'Enhanced photography equipment coverage, priority claims processing, dedicated agent support, global assistance coordination - €45/month'. The photography equipment protection corresponds to 'Technology Protection' under 'property_enhancement_services', rated 8. 
6. Therefore, the final mapping includes: Premium Medical Network (7), LifeFirst Standard Coverage (9), Adventure Travel Coverage (10), Technology Protection (8).
